description: Eliminate the confusing duplicate Next API route layer once API Gateway/Lambda parity is proven. Scope: remove src/app/api route handlers that are no longer production-relevant, or move any intentionally retained local-only test harness behind a clearly named non-production path. Update imports/tests so backend behavior is tested through Lambda handlers/shared domain logic, not NextRequest/NextResponse wrappers. Ensure static build/export does not compile misleading server route artifacts that developers might assume are deployed. Acceptance criteria: no production behavior depends on src/app/api; all browser /api/* calls are backed by API Gateway routes; docs explain that the patient app is static JS plus Lambda APIs; tests pass after deleting/quarantining the route layer.
title: Remove or quarantine src/app/api after Lambda parity is complete
